recommendations.title: Miss Sloane
recommendations.overview: An ambitious lobbyist faces off against the powerful gun lobby in an attempt to pass gun control legislation.

recommendations.title: Pushpa: The Rise
recommendations.overview: As Pushpa, a labourer, rises in the world of red sandalwood smuggling, he ends up making many enemies. However, violence ensues when the police try to topple his illegal business.

recommendations.title: Running Scared
recommendations.overview: A low-ranking thug is entrusted by his boss to dispose of a gun that killed corrupt cops, but things spiral out of control when the gun ends up in wrong hands.

recommendations.title: The Wild Goose Lake
recommendations.overview: A gangster ends up making a mistake that causes every gun on both sides of the law to point at him. While on the run, he comes across a mysterious woman who might get him out of trouble or make things worse.

recommendations.title: Looper
recommendations.overview: In the year 2044, time travel has not yet been invented but in 30 years it will have been. When the mob wants to get rid of someone, they will send their target into the past where a looper, a hired gun, like Joe is waiting to mop up. Joe is getting

recommendations.title: Gun
recommendations.overview: The Detroit Police launches a full-scale war against gun runners with the cooperation of the Feds and target a criminal named Rich. When a gun exchange goes bad and Rich’s old friend Angel, steps up big time and saves his life, they form a bond that

recommendations.title: Home for Rent
recommendations.overview: When her good tenants go bad, a landlord finds herself terrorized by a cult that seemingly has her husband enthralled — and her daughter in its sights.

recommendations.title: The Wall
recommendations.overview: An American sniper and his spotter engage in a deadly cat-and-mouse game with an Iraqi sniper.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Blast of Silence
recommendations.overview: A hired killer from Cleveland has a job to do on a second-string mob boss in New York. But a special girl from his past and a fat gun dealer with pet rats get in his way.
